content.en:
"The Spacetime Key is here!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

If he really let the Son of the Dead Universe open the door of time and space, then it will really be over.

When the time comes, he is afraid that he will have to flee this realm with the Terran and his relatives, otherwise he will definitely die.

Now, the key to time and space is in his hands, and as long as he doesn't open the door of time and space, the door of time and space cannot be opened.

"Give me back the Plane Key!"

The Son of the Dead Universe yelled.

The space-time key can't be lost, although there is no bloodline of the Demon Hell, this space-time key cannot be opened, and foreigners dare not open the space-time key, otherwise they will enter the territory of the Demon Prison Clan.

But once this time-space key is lost, there will be one less space-time key in the Demon Hell Clan.

This kind of space-time key can only be refined by the ancestor of the space-time dual cultivation, perhaps for that kind of ancestor, refining such a space-time key is only a matter of moment, and it is even easy to refine a large number of space-time keys.

However, why could their Demon Hell Clan ask that Ancestor to refine a new Space-Time Key?

So, once it's lost, it's really lost forever.

When the time comes, no matter how high his status is, his life in the Demon Hell Clan will not be easy.

But in an instant, he thought of a question-

"Damn, shouldn't I run away now?"

He even thought about snatching the space-time key from Ye Tian's hand, wasn't that looking for death?

Ye Tian easily cut off his arm with one blow, and the six holy sons were not Ye Tian's opponents, how could he be Ye Tian's opponents alone.

Escape!

The Son of the Dead Universe wanted to escape.

However, it was too late!

Ye Tian took out the Forbidden Yuan Blade and urged the Forbidden Yuan Blade.

There was no way, as soon as his replica body appeared, and the space-time key was taken away, these six holy sons would definitely want to escape.

It would be difficult for him to kill a holy son, and if all six of them fled, he would not be able to pursue them.

Therefore, a Son must be killed quickly.

And his strongest blow couldn't kill a holy son, so he could only use the forbidden yuan blade.

These Holy Sons didn't know what had happened in the Holy Gold Realm at the beginning, so they didn't recognize Ye Tian.

Otherwise, as soon as he saw the Forbidden Yuan Blade, he would definitely know Ye Tian.

"Die!"

Ye Tian held the Forbidden Yuan Blade to bless the Hegemony Holy Technique, and slashed at it with one sword.

Poof!

The forbidden yuan blade directly slashed the Dead Universe Saint Son into two with one sword, and his body was quickly annihilated.

Fallen Son of the Dead Universe!

Not far away.

The other five holy sons were dumbfounded, even with fear.

The strength of the Holy Son of the Dead Yu is not weaker than them, but he didn't expect to be killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

"Run!"

They didn't dare to fight Ye Tian anymore, otherwise they would definitely die.

However, Ye Tian used the Holy Technique at this time - the Five Elements Ban!

Of course, no matter how awesome the Five Elements Ban is, there is no way to completely block the actions of these five holy sons, after all, the Five Elements Ban is not strictly speaking a holy technique to block the void, it just has this ability.

Moreover, when the difference in strength is not large, there is really no way to completely block the void with the Five Elements Ban, so it can only block them.

Bang!!!!

The five holy sons used the secret treasures of their hole cards one after another, tore through the blockade, and began to flee one by one.

However, their speed was not as good as Ye Tian's.

Ye Tian used the Streamer Holy Technique, and his speed far surpassed these Holy Sons.

Immediately, Ye Tian's copy body caught up with a holy son, urged the forbidden yuan blade, and killed him in one sword.

The Holy Son, who does not have the protection of the holy relics, can't stop the Forbidden Yuan Blade at all.

However, with two consecutive outbursts of the power of the Forbidden Yuan Blade, cracks began to appear in Ye Tian's copy body.

But he didn't care.

This is the Daoshan Realm, even if the copy body falls, the Forbidden Yuan Blade will not be lost, and it will have no effect on him.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's body also stopped one of the Holy Sons, and only the two Holy Sons escaped a little farther.

can copy the body and continue to chase and kill, catching up with the Kanshui Holy Son.

"Don't kill me, I am the Holy Son of the Devouring Clan, if you kill me, the Devouring Clan will definitely destroy this realm in the future!"

Kanshui Saint Son threatened.

However, his words had no effect.

Ye Tian's forbidden yuan blade fell, and he was instantaneous.

The Son of Kanshui also fell.

At this time, only one Son was left at large.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

The Holy Son of Bai Yu fled here, and desperately accelerated, casting a secret treasure that could help him escape.

Almost in a short time, he was able to escape far away into the Dark Forbidden Realm.

However, he didn't have the slightest sense of relief, and he was still running away quickly.

Abrupt.

A breath appeared not far behind him.

After sensing this aura, he looked desperate.

Because Ye Tian caught up!

At this time, Ye Tian's copy body was already full of cracks, and he had been urging the Forbidden Yuan Blade for a long time, and it was urging again and again, which was even more serious than the last time he was in the Holy Gold Realm.

Simply speaking, he is now a domain ancestor, otherwise he would not have been able to withstand such a long battle.

However, he had to kill the Holy Son of Bai Xuan, otherwise once the Holy Son of Bai Xuan escaped and returned to the Dark Destruction Domain, the Mountain Realm would really be finished.

"Finally caught up!"

Ye Tian forcibly used the Void Escape Holy Technique, tore the void, appeared in front of the Bai Yu Holy Son, and immediately held the Forbidden Yuan Blade in his hand, and slashed it with all his strength.

Poof!

The Forbidden Yuan Blade tore apart the body of the Holy Son of Bai Yu, destroying his vitality.

The Holy Son of Bai Yu has also fallen!

And at this time, Ye Tian couldn't maintain the copy body, his breath continued to decline, and his body and soul were collapsing.

Ye Tian continued to use the Immortal Saint Technique, barely maintaining the immortality of his body and soul, and flew towards the Dao Mountain Realm.

Just as he was about to arrive at the Dao Mountain Realm, this replica body finally couldn't hold on and collapsed, and the Forbidden Yuan Blade in his hand also fell into the Dark Forbidden Domain.

But this place is not far from the Daoshan realm, and Ye Tian also knows the location, so he can find it back afterwards.

Daoshan boundary, on the battlefield.

The Holy Son who Ye Tian stopped was also seriously injured and dying, and he had almost no power to fight back under his attack.

One after another, the Holy Technique bombarded the body of this Holy Son, and finally killed the opponent with the Void Slashing Holy Technique.

At this point, all the six holy sons were killed.

As soon as the six holy sons died, Ye Tian began to slaughter the domain ancestors of the other Dark Destruction Domains.

All the Domain Ancestors in the Dao Mountain Realm surrounded these Domain Ancestors, and did not let any of them escape.

Ye Tian almost killed one in one move, and thousands of domain ancestors couldn't withstand Ye Tian's killing.

It didn't take long for all the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain to be destroyed!
